da-zero-a-otaku.title: From Zero to Otaku
da-zero-a-otaku.tagline: Never watched anime? Start right here.
da-zero-a-otaku.blurb: The path for beginners: the right titles to fall in love with the medium.
da-zero-a-otaku.about: Never watched an anime, or only seen a few? These are the perfect starting points: accessible, gripping, well-made stories that instantly show you why half the world loves anime. No niche stuff, no endless commitment to get going.

battle-shonen.title: Battle Shōnen
battle-shonen.tagline: Fights, powers that keep growing and rivalries: the most popular, recognizable action genre.
battle-shonen.blurb: Fights, growing powers, tournaments: action shōnen.
battle-shonen.about: Spectacular fights, powers that keep growing and heroes who never give up. Action shōnen is the gateway genre of anime: the one that raised half the world.

seinen-e-maturo.title: Seinen & Grown-Up Stuff
seinen-e-maturo.tagline: No squealing and friendship: crime, war, revenge, moral ambiguity. Anime written for people who've grown up.
seinen-e-maturo.blurb: Anime for adults: heavy themes, violence, no sugar-coating.
seinen-e-maturo.about: Adult stories: crime, war, revenge, moral ambiguity. No sugar-coating, characters who actually change, and real stakes.

mindfuck.title: Mindfuck
mindfuck.tagline: Psychological thrillers, mysteries and twists: stories built to blindside you.
mindfuck.blurb: Psychological thrillers that mess with your head.
mindfuck.about: Psychological thrillers, deception and plot twists. Stories that turn simple premises into perfect machines, built to catch you off guard.

horror-e-disagio.title: Horror & Dread
horror-e-disagio.tagline: Horror, gore and unsettling atmospheres: anime that stick with you, with no happy ending guaranteed.
horror-e-disagio.blurb: Monsters, blood and nightmares: stuff that unsettles you.
horror-e-disagio.about: Monsters, gore and atmospheres that linger. No happy ending guaranteed: this is the best of animated horror, if you can stomach it.

romance.title: Romance
romance.tagline: Love stories: from the sentimental drama that hits hard to the light romantic comedy.
romance.blurb: Love stories, from drama to romantic comedy.
romance.about: Love stories that actually work: from the sentimental drama that hits hard to the light romantic comedy.

slice-of-life.title: Slice of Life
slice-of-life.tagline: No big events: everyday life, slow rhythms, little things. The comfort anime, the one you put on to feel good.
slice-of-life.blurb: Everyday life and slow rhythms: the comfort anime, zero stress.

commedia.title: Comedy
commedia.tagline: Anime made to crack you up. Goofy, absurd, surreal: when you just want to have fun without thinking about anything.
commedia.blurb: Anime made purely to make you laugh.
commedia.about: Anime made purely to make you laugh: goofy, absurd, surreal. When you just want to have fun without thinking about anything.

sport.title: Sports
sport.tagline: Sweat, rivalry and that thrill when the decisive point is up in the air. You don't need to know a thing about the sport: the adrenaline hits all the same.
sport.blurb: Teams, rivalries and matches down to the wire.

cinema-dautore.title: Animated Films
cinema-dautore.tagline: The films that introduced Japanese animation to the world. Best seen big, on a screen that does them justice.
cinema-dautore.blurb: The films by the great directors: Ghibli, Shinkai, Miyazaki and co.
cinema-dautore.about: The films that introduced Japanese animation to the world: Ghibli, Miyazaki, Satoshi Kon, Shinkai. Best seen big, on a screen that does them justice.

chicche-e-deep-cut.title: Hidden Gems
chicche-e-deep-cut.tagline: Niche, little-known but high-quality titles: gems the crowd missed.
chicche-e-deep-cut.blurb: Niche stuff almost nobody knows: for connoisseurs.

azione.title: Adrenaline Action
azione.blurb: Clashes, chases and animation that slaps.
azione.about: Pure adrenaline: spectacular fights, relentless pace and jaw-dropping animation. When you want something that starts right away and never lets go.

antieroi.title: Antiheroes & Revenge
antieroi.tagline: No good guys versus bad guys.
antieroi.about: Protagonists who aren't heroes: revenge, moral ambiguity, questionable means for questionable ends. Stories where 'right' and 'wrong' blur together.

isekai.title: Isekai
isekai.tagline: Transported or reborn in another world: you start from scratch, among levels, guilds and powers.
isekai.blurb: Transported to another world: you start from scratch.
isekai.about: The 'other world' genre: a protagonist ends up in a fantasy universe and has to get by, among skills, guilds and monsters. From pure entertainment to the more polished stories.

fantasy.title: Fantasy
fantasy.tagline: Magical worlds born that way: epic adventures, creatures and magic, without arriving from another world.
fantasy.blurb: Magical worlds, epic adventure and creatures.
fantasy.about: Fantasy worlds built with care: magic, creatures, epic journeys. Unlike isekai, here the world is the characters' own from the start.

sci-fi.title: Science Fiction
sci-fi.tagline: Future, space, cyberpunk and big questions: from spectacle to reflection.
sci-fi.blurb: Future, space and cyberpunk: animated sci-fi.
sci-fi.about: Future and technology: grimy cyberpunk, space, artificial intelligence and dystopias. Sci-fi that makes you think as much as it dazzles.

mecha.title: Mecha
mecha.tagline: Giant piloted robots. The best ones aren't about robots, but about the people inside them.
mecha.blurb: Giant piloted robots: war, pilots, drama.
mecha.about: Giant piloted robots: from space wars to the intimate dramas of their pilots. A historic subgenre of animated science fiction.

sopravvivenza.title: Survival
sopravvivenza.tagline: Death games, battle royales and deadly rules: whoever stays alive wins.
sopravvivenza.blurb: Death games and deadly rules: whoever stays alive wins.
sopravvivenza.about: Deadly games, battle royales and nightmare premises: a group forced to survive ruthless rules. Sky-high tension.

storici.title: Historical
storici.tagline: Real historical settings: wars, samurai, distant eras told seriously.
storici.blurb: Real eras: wars, samurai, history told for real.
storici.about: Stories set in real times and places: ancient wars, samurai, 1930s mafia. When animation tells History with weight and rigor.

viaggi-nel-tempo.title: Time Travel
viaggi-nel-tempo.tagline: Loops, time jumps and second chances: changing the past is never free.
viaggi-nel-tempo.blurb: Loops and time jumps: changing the past isn't free.
viaggi-nel-tempo.about: Stories built on time: repeating loops, jumps into the past, paradoxes. Often razor-tense thrillers, where every choice counts twice.

supereroi.title: Superheroes
supereroi.tagline: Powers, secret identities and people in spandex: the anime version of the superhero comic.
supereroi.blurb: Powers and secret identities: superheroes, anime-style.
supereroi.about: Worlds where having a power is the norm: hero schools, rankings, vigilantes. Japan's answer to Western superheroes, often with a touch of parody.

crimine.title: Crime & Gangsters
crimine.tagline: Mafia, bounty hunters and the underworld: no heroes, just people living on the margins.
crimine.blurb: Mafia, bounties and the underworld: people on the margins.
crimine.about: Organized crime, bounty hunters, clan vendettas. Noir atmospheres and ambiguous characters, often written for an adult audience.

vendetta.title: Revenge
vendetta.tagline: Driven by a wrong to repay: protagonists who burn for payback, at any cost.
vendetta.blurb: Driven by a wrong to repay, at any cost.
vendetta.about: Stories driven by a wrong suffered: revenge as the engine. Often dark and mature, they show what it costs — and what's left — after getting it.

super-robot.title: Classic Super Robots
super-robot.tagline: The giant robots that founded the genre: Mazinger, Grendizer, Gundam. Where it all began.
super-robot.blurb: The historic giant robots: Mazinger, Grendizer, Gundam.
super-robot.about: The super robots that founded the genre in the '70s: Mazinger Z, Grendizer, Getter Robo, the first Gundam. The roots of all modern mecha.

storie-che-spezzano.title: Stories That Break You
storie-che-spezzano.blurb: Anime that hit straight to the heart: dramas and goodbyes that stay.
storie-che-spezzano.about: Stories you don't watch, you live. Dramas, losses and bonds that stick with you for days. If you're after something that makes you feel something strong, start here — but brace yourself.

protagonisti-geniali.title: Brilliant Minds
protagonisti-geniali.tagline: When the head matters more than the fists.
protagonisti-geniali.blurb: Brilliant minds, perfect plans and battles of wits.
protagonisti-geniali.about: No shouting and energy beams: here you win with your brain. Strategists, manipulators and geniuses who move others like pawns. For anyone who loves elaborate plans and calculated twists.

spettacolo-occhi.title: A Feast for the Eyes
spettacolo-occhi.blurb: The titles with the most spectacular animation around.
spettacolo-occhi.about: When you just want to sit there stunned. Studios like MAPPA, ufotable, Trigger and Wit go all out here: fights, colors and direction worth the watch on their own.
